summary.verdict_basis: US-846 completion verification passed. Spexus current_context was read before the PERSONAL-EP-180 epic hierarchy. Exact accepted reports for MZ-601 through MZ-604 are present at the requested paths and accepted. Source/test inspection confirms PERSONAL-REQ-1763, PERSONAL-AC-2430, and PERSONAL-AC-2431 have executable evidence. The full-bullet smoke is deterministic and release-evidence quality: fixed seed 639, real engine, real heuristic AI, legal-action checks before applyAction, phase=finished assertion, maxSteps=80, progress/stuck protection, and useful diagnostics. Regression verification and release-readiness evidence exist. Mocked/static evidence is disclosed as local in-process Vitest/jsdom/localStorage/static fixture evidence, not backend-live evidence. Security, backend, auth, migration, and server persistence obligations remain not applicable for the static Vite/localStorage app scope.
summary.us_841_caveat: The historically requested US-841 completion report path is absent. This gate does not invent that report; it accepts current direct persistence/start-resume executable tests plus orchestrator-log completion context as sufficient for US-846 release readiness.

requirements_coverage.limitations: Evidence is automated in-process unit/integration/smoke coverage for a static local app; no backend-live path applies.

evidence: task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1170/attempt-1.json records npm run verify passing 14 files / 137 tests plus tsc and vite build

acceptance_criteria_coverage.limitations: Single deterministic bounded seed is accepted for the smoke gate; adjacent targeted suites cover broader rule/AI behavior.

component_coverage.limitations: Single active Spexus component in scope.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Complete regression and targeted full-bullet smoke verification executed after MZ-602.

evidence_matrix.limitations: MZ-604 relied on MZ-603 same-day verify evidence rather than rerunning broad verification.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Used exact requested paths; no attempts inferred.
Scope is automated coverage and release evidence, not new gameplay features.
In-process static app automated tests, not live backend tests.
Completion verifier relied on accepted same-day regression evidence instead of rerunning build-producing commands.
Smoke uses one deterministic bounded seed and bulletTarget=1 by design.
MZ-603 records npm run verify and targeted smoke rerun; this report did not rerun them to honor write restrictions.
No server rollback, feature flag, deployment smoke, or live API gate applies to this local static app scope.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: localStorage/jsdom/static deterministic fixture evidence is accepted only for local static app behavior. No backend-live claims are made.
No backend, auth, accounts, server API, database migration, tenant scope, or server persistence exists in this US scope.
US-846 confirms, but does not replace, earlier acceptance gates.
Historical US-841 review report remains missing.
